data.name: Yogurt: Wet Dreams
data.detailed_description:
Yogurt: Wet Dreams! - a clicker with a lot of beautiful girls! You must collect all the girls, for this you need to bring them to the peak with your clicks! Each girl is animated, voiced and emotional!


What can be found in this game:
  • Beautiful pictures and animations of girls
  • Each girl responds to your every click
  • Incredible sound and visual effects
  • Each girl with her own preferences
  • Gallery with pictures of girls that you will open during the game

When you buy an upgrade, it will appear on the screen!

The game has amazing graphics, beautiful girls, and relaxing classic clicker gameplay. Unlock animated girls and collect them all!

data.short_description: Yogurt: Wet Dreams! - a clicker with a lot of beautiful girls! You must collect all the girls, for this you need to bring them to the peak with your clicks! Each girl is animated, voiced and emotional!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i3 6300
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5 6400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Microsoft Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel(R) Core(TM) i3 6300
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
